modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook shows message about server settings when opening.

full_description_text:  
When I open Outlook, I see a message that says my account is being redirected to a server for settings. It asks if I want to allow this server to configure my settings. I don’t understand why this is happening and if I should trust it. It’s confusing and I just want to use my email.
short_description: Outlook shows message about server settings when opening.
description: When I open Outlook, I see a message that says my account is being redirected to a server for settings. It asks if I want to allow this server to configure my settings. I don’t understand why this is happening and if I should trust it. It’s confusing and I just want to use my email.
